generated_oml:
instance EnvironmentalSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental sensors embedded in the BIM model providing ambient air quality and humidity measurements."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalData
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensors embedded in the BIM model providing real‑time indoor temperature readings."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureData
]

instance IlluminanceSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Illuminance sensors embedded in the BIM model providing real‑time lighting level measurements."
    DTDFVocab:producedData IlluminanceData
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy sensors embedded in the BIM model detecting presence of occupants for adaptive control."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyData
]

instance EnvironmentalData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnvironmentalSensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance IlluminanceData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IlluminanceSensor
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance EnvironmentalDataPoint : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Environmental data point received by the Ditto twin, used for air quality monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MessagingMiddlewareEclipseHono, DigitalTwinPlatformDitto
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentalData
]

instance TemperatureDataPoint : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature data point received by the Ditto twin, used for heating and cooling optimization."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MessagingMiddlewareEclipseHono, DigitalTwinPlatformDitto
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureData
]

instance IlluminanceDataPoint : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Illuminance data point received by the Ditto twin, used for dynamic lighting control."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MessagingMiddlewareEclipseHono, DigitalTwinPlatformDitto
    DTDFVocab:fromData IlluminanceData
]

instance OccupancyDataPoint : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Occupancy data point received by the Ditto twin, used for occupancy‑based HVAC and lighting management."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MessagingMiddlewareEclipseHono, DigitalTwinPlatformDitto
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyData
]

instance MessagingMiddlewareEclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono, the messaging middleware that publishes sensor events to Hono topics and forwards them to Ditto."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringDashboardService, SimulationAnalyticsService, AdaptiveLightingRLService, DataDrivenControlLogicGenerationService, BIMVisualizationService
]

instance DigitalTwinPlatformDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto, the digital twin platform that stores and processes twin data and provides an API for third‑party analytics."
    DTDFVocab:enables ThirdPartyAnalyticsAPIService
]

instance VisualizationEngineUnreal5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5, the interactive visualization engine used for real‑time dashboards and BIM model rendering."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringDashboardService, BIMVisualizationService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model‑driven engineering toolchain that extracts and transforms enriched BIM data into runtime artifacts."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataDrivenControlLogicGenerationService
]

instance RuntimeArtifactModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Runtime artefacts generated from enriched BIM, containing middleware metadata such as tenant and device IDs."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MessagingMiddlewareEclipseHono, DigitalTwinPlatformDitto
]

instance DittoTwinDefinitionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Ditto twin definition model created via model‑to‑text transformations, defining device twins for lighting, HVAC, and energy assets."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DigitalTwinPlatformDitto
]

instance ConfigurationFileModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Configuration files for the Ditto twin and Hono configurator, specifying topics, tenant context, and policy rules."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MessagingMiddlewareEclipseHono
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time monitoring dashboard powered by Unreal Engine 5 displaying live building metrics."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, DecisionSupportInsight
]

instance SimulationAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation and predictive analytics service for energy and comfort optimisation."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, ComfortOptimizationInsight
]

instance AdaptiveLightingRLService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Reinforcement‑learning based task planning service for adaptive lighting (BOREALIS)."
    DTDFVocab:provides LightingRLInsight, LightingControlAction
]

instance DataDrivenControlLogicGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that generates data‑driven control logic from BIM metadata and sensor data streams."
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlLogicGenerationInsight, LightingControlAction, HVACControlAction
]

instance ThirdPartyAnalyticsAPIService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "API service exposing DT data for third‑party analytics and decision support."
    DTDFVocab:provides DecisionSupportInsight
]

instance BIMVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualization service for rendering 3D BIM models within Unreal Engine 5."
    DTDFVocab:provides BIMVisualizationInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on energy optimisation derived from real‑time dashboards and analytics."
]

instance ComfortOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on indoor comfort optimisation based on environmental data and occupancy awareness."
]

instance LightingRLInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight from the RL‑based lighting control service on optimal lighting schedules."
]

instance DecisionSupportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Executive insight for facility managers to support operational planning and decision making."
]

instance ControlLogicGenerationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into automatically generated control logic derived from BIM and data."
]

instance BIMVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight from 3D BIM visualisation highlighting spatial asset interactions."
]

instance LightingControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic lighting control action sent back to lighting actuators via Ditto."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HVACControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic HVAC control action sent back to HVAC actuators via Ditto."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting actuator (e.g., dimmable LED driver) defined within the enriched BIM model, controlled by DT twin."
]

instance LEDDriverActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "LED driver actuator for dimming and colour temperature adjustment in the building."
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC actuator (e.g., set‑point controller) defined within the enriched BIM model, controlled by DT twin."
]

instance LivingLabBuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains BuildingMasterTwin
]

instance BuildingMasterTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Central building twin that aggregates device twins for lighting, HVAC, and other building systems."
    base:contains LightingDeviceTwin, HVACTwin
]

instance LightingDeviceTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Lighting device twin representing all lighting assets within the building."
    base:contains LightingActuator, IlluminanceSensor
]

instance HVACTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "HVAC device twin representing heating, ventilation and air‑conditioning assets."
    base:contains HVACActuator, TemperatureSensor, OccupancySensor
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the DT are sent as Ditto twin update operations; through Eclipse Hono they are routed to the building control system, enabling the physical assets to react to DT‑driven decisions."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "All sensor data and control messages are exchanged in real‑time, guaranteeing continuous synchronization between the physical and virtual models."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A central DT framework (the “DT Framework”) acts as the hub for bidirectional data exchange between the physical building and the virtual twins, coordinating the various device twins and services."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design (BIM authoring), Construction (device configuration and comms mapping), Deployment (automated generation of runtime artifacts), Operation (live monitoring and control), Maintenance & Evolution (BIM updates → re‑deployment, policy changes, service upgrades)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The DT’s fidelity is assessed using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric; semantic drift is mitigated by continuous synchronization of BIM and runtime data, ensuring alignment between the digital and physical models."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Physical devices publish data to and receive commands via Eclipse Hono; Ditto subscribes to these topics and serves twin updates; the DT thereby communicates through Hono’s messaging fabric, typically implemented over MQTT or a similar lightweight protocol."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT components (Ditto, Hono broker, and the Unreal Engine visualization) are deployed on a cloud/edge server; configuration is managed by the Hono/Ditto Configurator which orchestrates the deployment scripts."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "BIM is used as the primary data model, providing a standardised, IFC‑compatible semantic backbone for the DT."
]
